title: Caching Layer
constraints: Semantically similar queries must return cached responses without calling the LLM
The cache must store and retrieve based on semantic similarity, not exact string match
Cache hits must be significantly faster than LLM calls and incur zero token cost
The cache must have a configurable TTL or max size to prevent unbounded growth
hints: Use an embedding model to convert queries to vectors, then check cosine similarity against cached query vectors before calling the LLM
Set a similarity threshold (e.g., 0.95) — above it, return the cached response; below it, call the LLM and cache the new result
LangChain has built-in caching support via SQLiteCache or InMemoryCache for exact-match caching, but semantic caching requires embeddings

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage, SystemMessage
import time

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: Every query calls the LLM, even repeated or near-identical questions
# TODO: Add a caching layer that serves cached responses for similar queries
def answer_question(question: str) -> str:
    start = time.time()
    response = llm.invoke([
        SystemMessage(content="You are a helpful customer support agent. Answer concisely."),
        HumanMessage(content=question),
    ])
    elapsed = time.time() - start
    return f"[{elapsed:.2f}s] {response.content}"

questions = [
    "What is your return policy?",
    "How do I return an item?",
    "What's your policy on returns?",
    "Do you offer free shipping?",
    "Is shipping free?",
    "What is your return policy?",
    "Do you ship for free?",
    "How can I return a product?",
]
for q in questions:
    result = answer_question(q)
    print(f"Q: {q}\nA: {result}\n")
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew, Process
from crewai import LLM
import time

llm = LLM(model="gpt-4o-mini")

support_agent = Agent(
    role="Customer Support",
    goal="Answer customer questions concisely",
    backstory="You are a helpful customer support agent. Answer concisely.",
    llm=llm,
)

# BUG: Every query calls the LLM, even repeated or near-identical questions
# TODO: Add a caching layer that serves cached responses for similar queries
questions = [
    "What is your return policy?",
    "How do I return an item?",
    "What's your policy on returns?",
    "Do you offer free shipping?",
    "Is shipping free?",
    "What is your return policy?",
    "Do you ship for free?",
    "How can I return a product?",
]
for q in questions:
    start = time.time()
    task = Task(description=q, expected_output="A concise answer", agent=support_agent)
    crew = Crew(agents=[support_agent], tasks=[task], process=Process.sequential)
    result = crew.kickoff()
    elapsed = time.time() - start
    print(f"Q: {q}\nA: [{elapsed:.2f}s] {result}\n")
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner
import time

agent = Agent(
    name="Customer Support",
    instructions="You are a helpful customer support agent. Answer concisely.",
    model="gpt-4o-mini",
)

# BUG: Every query calls the LLM, even repeated or near-identical questions
# TODO: Add a caching layer that serves cached responses for similar queries
questions = [
    "What is your return policy?",
    "How do I return an item?",
    "What's your policy on returns?",
    "Do you offer free shipping?",
    "Is shipping free?",
    "What is your return policy?",
    "Do you ship for free?",
    "How can I return a product?",
]
for q in questions:
    start = time.time()
    result = Runner.run_sync(agent, q)
    elapsed = time.time() - start
    print(f"Q: {q}\nA: [{elapsed:.2f}s] {result.final_output}\n")

evaluationCriteria.label: Cache hit on similar queries
evaluationCriteria.description: Semantically similar queries return cached responses without calling the LLM

evaluationCriteria.label: Faster on cache hit
evaluationCriteria.description: Cache hits are significantly faster than LLM calls

evaluationCriteria.label: Zero token cost on hit
evaluationCriteria.description: Cached responses incur no LLM token cost

evaluationCriteria.label: Bounded cache size
evaluationCriteria.description: The cache has a configurable TTL or max size to prevent unbounded growth
